name: python3-gevent-websocket
title: python3-gevent-websocket
summary: websocket library for the gevent networking library (Python 3)
description:
websocket library for the gevent networking library (Python 3)
gevent-websocket is a WebSocket library for the gevent networking library.
.
Features include:
.
* Integration on both socket level or using an abstract interface.
* RPC and PubSub framework using WAMP (WebSocket Application Messaging
Protocol).
* Easily extendible using a simple WebSocket protocol plugin API.
.
This package contains the Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gevent-websocket because websocket library for the gevent networking library (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gevent-websocket as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gevent-websocket with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gevent-websocket --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
